insight: A frozen 96-candidate round-robin expansion grew the seed by 17 execution-verified both-miss rows across 10 repositories, including 8 rows that survive the deterministic detector and both frontier judges, but it missed the registered >=20-row benchmark-growth bar.
next_action: Pre-register iter155 as an adaptive expansion gate that uses iter154's productive strata and failure modes before any new provider or cloud work; do not release a v1 benchmark from iter154.
